# Phase 1 Report: Data Preparation & Community Definition

**Project:** Funding Knowledge — How Education Projects Navigate Kickstarter  
**Generated:** April 01, 2026 (auto-generated by `src/phase1_data_preparation.py`)

---

## 1. Data Cleaning & Deduplication

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Raw dataset | 217,245 rows x 19 columns |
| Duplicates removed | 24,357 (11.2%) |
| After deduplication | 192,888 unique projects |
| Completed projects | 180,675 (58.2% successful) |

### Missing Value Treatment

| Check | Result | Action |
|---|---|---|
| Null values | 0 columns with nulls | No imputation needed |
| Empty strings | 0 columns affected | No treatment needed |

The script includes defensive fallback logic for nulls (text->empty string, numeric->median, bad dates->drop) that activates automatically if the dataset changes.

### Edge Cases & Outlier Treatment

| Item | Count | Action |
|---|---|---|
| `goal_usd` < $1 | 22 | Kept (symbolic campaigns) |
| `goal_usd` outliers | 953 | Capped at 99.5th percentile ($611,263). Raw preserved in `goal_usd_raw` |
| `duration` > 90 days | 43 | Capped at 92 days |
| `backers_count` = 0 | 15,867 | Kept (all failed, valid data) |
| `funding_ratio` NaN | 0 | From $0 goals (protected) |

### Biased Categories
26 `main_category` values contain only successful projects (data artifact), affecting 38,188 projects (21.1%). Flagged with `biased_category = 1`.

---

## 2. Education Community Definition

### Layer 1: Category-Based (3,904 projects)

| Category | Parent | Count | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| Academic | publishing | 1,086 | Clean |
| Children's Books | publishing | 2,307 | Biased |
| Workshops | dance | 176 | Clean |
| Kids | music | 335 | Clean |

### Layer 2: Keyword-Based (7,289 additional projects)

Keywords searched in blurbs: `educate, school, classroom, student, teach, learn, curriculum, tutorial, textbook, lesson, course, training, literacy, STEM`

Overlap with Layer 1: 751 projects

### Combined Education Ecosystem

| Segment | Count | % |
|---|---|---|
| Category only | 3,153 | 28.2% |
| Keyword only | 7,289 | 65.1% |
| Both | 751 | 6.7% |
| **Total** | **11,193** | |
| Biased (flagged) | 3,296 | |
| **Clean** | **7,897** | **40.6% success** |

---

## 3. Feature Engineering

**16 structural features:** year, month, day_of_week, launch_hour, log_goal, goal_bucket, blurb_word_count, blurb_char_count, has_exclamation, has_question, has_numbers, n_exclamation, creator_total_projects, is_repeat_creator, country_group, category_avg_success

**13 NLP features:** sentiment_compound, sentiment_pos, sentiment_neg, readability_fre, readability_grade, and 8 custom lexicon flags

---

## 4. Early NLP Findings

### Sentiment
| Group | Mean Compound |
|---|---|
| Successful | 0.272 |
| Failed | 0.305 |
| *Overall* | *0.286* |

Failed projects are slightly *more* positive in tone than successful ones.

### Readability
Mean Flesch Reading Ease: 60.5 | Successful: 60.4 | Failed: 60.7. Minimal difference.

### Lexicon Analysis

| Lexicon | Theme | Matches | Success (yes) | Success (no) | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `lex_innovation` | Innovation | 28,165 | 64.2% | 57.0% | **+7.2pp** |
| `lex_professional` | Professional | 11,237 | 60.7% | 58.0% | **+2.7pp** |
| `lex_children_kids` | Children Kids | 11,089 | 60.3% | 58.0% | **+2.3pp** |
| `lex_help_please` | Help Please | 23,966 | 58.8% | 58.1% | **+0.8pp** |
| `lex_interactive` | Interactive | 4,629 | 58.8% | 58.2% | **+0.7pp** |
| `lex_passion_dream` | Passion Dream | 11,103 | 54.2% | 58.4% | **-4.2pp** |
| `lex_community` | Community | 9,005 | 51.2% | 58.5% | **-7.3pp** |
| `lex_digital_online` | Digital Online | 8,995 | 37.4% | 59.3% | **-21.9pp** |

**Key insight:** Innovation language helps most, digital/online language hurts dramatically. Passion and community framing underperform.

## 6. Notes for Downstream Phases

1. Filter `biased_category == 0` when modeling at `main_category` level
2. Column naming: `sub_category` = broad (food, tech), `main_category` = detailed (Food Trucks, Academic)
3. Children's Books is both education AND biased — exclude from modeling
4. `goal_usd` capped at $611,263; original in `goal_usd_raw`
5. Class balance (education, clean): 3,208 success / 4,689 failed (40.6%)
